it.com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl
Class IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType

java.lang.Object
  junit.framework.Assert
      junit.framework.TestCase
          com.atlassian.jira.functest.framework.FuncTestCase
              com.atlassian.jira.webtests.EmailFuncTestCase
                  it.com.burningcode.jira.issue.customfields.impl.IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType
All Implemented Interfaces:
com.atlassian.jira.functest.framework.FunctTestConstants, com.atlassian.jira.functest.framework.log.FuncTestLogger, com.atlassian.jira.webtests.util.EnvironmentAware, junit.framework.Test
public class IntegrationTestWatcherFieldType
extends com.atlassian.jira.webtests.EmailFuncTestCase

Class used for integration testing for the JIRA Watcher Field Plugin. TODO Get integration testing on bulk change. TODO Check issue security TODO Write test to check for issue JWFP-9

Author:
Ray Barham

testSettings

public void testSettings()

testSimpleFilterByWatcher

public void testSimpleFilterByWatcher()
Checks simple filter/searching using the watcher field. Also checks that issues are being re-indexed on adding watchers (otherwise, searches would not work).

testJqlFilterByWatcher

public void testJqlFilterByWatcher()
Checks sql filter/searching using the watcher field

testChangeHistory

public void testChangeHistory()
                       throws IOException,
                              SAXException
Checks that change history is effected properly. See issue JWF-5.

Throws:
SAXException
IOException

testEditWatcherOnIssueTransition

public void testEditWatcherOnIssueTransition()
                                      throws IOException,
                                             SAXException
Checks that watchers are edited properly on issue transition. See issue JWF-4.

Throws:
SAXException
IOException
